title: she.rs CBC: IV length passed as magic literal 16u32
description: In she.rs, she_enc_cbc and she_dec_cbc pass the IV length to the C API as the literal 16u32, even though the IV is typed as &[u8; 16] (so iv_buf.len() is 16 by construction). All other slice lengths in the file are derived from the slice itself. Rewrite: pass iv_buf.len() as u32 (or a named constant like SHE_BLOCK_SZ = 16) so the relationship between the type and the argument is explicit rather than a bare magic literal.
